blocks.text: Reitan stuns Augusta — Norway's best Masters story in years
Kristoffer Reitan at T10 has experts in disbelief — 'goosebumps over the steps he's taken,' says his training partner. McIlroy leads at -12, but Norway has its own Augusta story this weekend.
🎾 Sun 09:00 — Casper Ruud opens Monte-Carlo Masters, clay-court title contender
